programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man and his brothers run a massive $40 million rare coin con until they're caught and embark on a grisly revenge plan.

programme.title: America's Next Investment
programme.desc: America's Next Investment: Exploring Opportunities in AI,Tech, Real Estate, Alcohol, Cannabis, and More. Tune in to discover how to invest!

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle Is Here… & It is a Once-In-A-Lifetime Coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Jason Van Eman is a B-list actor from Oklahoma who decides to seek fame and fortune as a Hollywood producer.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: In 2005, a district attorney in Pennsylvania went missing, seven years after he investigated sex-abuse allegations made against Jerry Sandusky.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Personal injury attorney Tom Girardi posits himself as a champion for the little guy, but jilted clients cry foul when they discover him cheating them out of millions in settlement money as his wife flaunts her wealth on reality television.

programme.title: How to Get Your Money Right
programme.desc: Award-winning journalist and civil rights acitivist Dr. Benjamin F. Chavis Jr. talks about how to deal with business, banking and market by exploring the latest concepts and strategies for personal economic growth.

programme.title: The American Dream
programme.desc: The American dream, a real show, highlighting real stories of our neighborhoods, culture, and real estate. Emmy nominated production team.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: An Aetna Medicare Advantage plan might be right for you
programme.desc: When it comes to Medicare coverage, there are a lot of options. Learn about your choices so that you can select the coverage that's right for you. Call to speak with a licensed Aetna agent today.

programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: The Truth About Social Security & Your Retirement
programme.desc: Prices are rising, and Social Security may not keep up. Learn practical ways to protect your money and retirement lifestyle in today's economy.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Iconic Silver Set
programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver! This set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series!

programme.title: Learn More About Medicare Advantage Plans from Humana
programme.desc: Learn about the variety of Humana Medicare plans designed to fit people's needs, lifestyle, and budget.

programme.title: Silver Rarities Set
programme.desc: RCTV is offering a stunning complete Set of 43: 1986-2025 American Silver Eagles graded in Mint State 69; this set includes the first ever Star Privy mark issue, plus the Eagle Privy issue as a free bonus to create the ultimate ASE collection!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: 1776 USA Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a 1 of 250 Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Energy bars that include protein from crickets; a garage lock to prevent break-ins; a shower cap that fixes "bedhead"; digital textbook rentals; an update on Fiber Fix.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A high-performance problem-solver; a DNA test that aids in medical research; a high-tech solution for a common chore; a man encourages girls to study coding and technology; a returning entrepreneur showcases his improved home security product.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A decadent breakfast treat; an online fashion trading platform that aims to help women save money while easing the environmental impact of manufacturing clothing; an idea for a convenient and affordable swimming pool; a product for moms on the go.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Knife sharpening by mail; a device that offers relief from bug bites; a bathroom product to help block odors; a vegan alternative to pork rinds.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Reality TV personality Peter Jones; guest shark Kevin Hart; a tool for cleaning quickly and easily; a healthier version of a favorite indulgence; a stylish men's apparel line; a problem-solving wearable design; an update on Quevos.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An AI tool that offers cost-friendly college admissions support; a Japanese persimmon-based soap; edible candy crafts for kids; sleeping bags made exclusively for children.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A kit for teaching how to create cuddly animal characters; a trussing device designed to cook the perfect bird; a company that provides convenient personal storage for medical necessities; an update on Beatbox Beverages.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An all-in-one styling device for textured hair; a multiuse water bottle; a baby bottle monitor that signals spoiled milk; swim goggles that will not pull one's hair; Emma Grede returns as guest shark.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Energy bars that include protein from crickets; a garage lock to prevent break-ins; a shower cap that fixes "bedhead"; digital textbook rentals; an update on Fiber Fix.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A beauty product that combines luxury and glamour with safety and quality; a product for cutting cheese; a space-saving beauty organizer; a way to remove pet hair from clothes; an update on FitFighter.
